description_long: This is a full-size computer keyboard with a standard QWERTY layout, including a dedicated numeric keypad on the right side. The keyboard is primarily black with white legends on the keys, and it features a low-profile, rectangular design with slightly rounded corners. The surface appears to be made of matte plastic, with a subtle sheen visible under light. The keys are slightly raised and evenly spaced, with a clear separation between the main typing area, function keys, and the numeric keypad. A small, circular brand logo is visible in the center below the spacebar, indicating the manufacturer. There are no visible cables or wireless receivers attached to the keyboard, and the overall condition appears to be used, with some minor surface marks.
description: A black, full-size keyboard with a numeric keypad, white key legends, and a central brand logo. The surface is matte plastic and the keyboard shows minor signs of use.
description_view_0: Front view showing the full key layout, including the main typing area, function keys, and numeric keypad.
description_view_1: Angled left-side view highlighting the depth of the keyboard and the raised profile of the keys.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the keyboard's length and the arrangement of keys from the back.
description_view_3: Angled right-side view focusing on the numeric keypad and the overall slim profile.
